prompt.content:
The remote working policy has been discontinued. Two new office locations - Seattle and Chicago - are being added, bringing the total to five office locations (3 existing + 2 new). Employees must now be physically based in one of these five locations. Accordingly, update the Greenhouse tool to reject:
- any active applicants outside these 5 office locations 
- those hired on or after 1 Dec 2025 and are based outside these office locations

In the console, report the total number of rejected applicants by location after the requested Greenhouse update.
